name: Arc.ArcAttributes
summary: The ArcAttributes class is the attributes class for the arc.

constructors.name: Arc.ArcAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new default arc attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: Arc.ArcAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new arc attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributesFile
params.doc: The filename of the attributes file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Arrowhead
properties.summary: The arrowhead attributes of the open graphic object. The end points of an open graphic object can contain arrowheads.

properties.name: Line
properties.summary: The line attributes of the graphic object. A graphic object always consists of lines.
